title: Requests for opinions: 2025
body: "The table below shows information about opinion requests we have received in 2025 and what stage each request has reached.  For example, you can see whether:   you can file observations on a request or whether the period for doing so has expired we have issued an opinion the person who filed the request has withdrawn it we have refused a request for an opinion. Where we’ve issued a decision refusing the request, you can view this in our decisions database   Further information  If you would like more information about a particular request please contact us by:   telephone: +44 (0)1633 814443 email: opinions@ipo.gov.uk    2025 requests     Opinion number Patent/SPC number, title and owner Requester and request date Issue (Infringement and/or Validity) Observations deadline Outcome   16/25  EP3076787Methods of microbiological control in beet sugar and other sugar-containing plant material processingBuckman Laboratories International, Inc Ingrassia, Fisher and Lorenz UK Ltd12 December 2025 Validity 28 January 2025     15/25  EP2928672Hand-held three-dimensional drawing deviceWobbleworks, Inc Keltie LLP15 December 2025 Infringement 20 January 2025     14/25  EP4376670Skin lotion dispenserSolar Buddies Limited Sirius IP Ltd2 December 2025 Infringement 5 January 2026     13/25  GB2557561Segmented brushless stator interconnect systemKollmorgen Corporation Thomas Owen Hutchinson6 November 2025 Validity 4 December 2025     12/25  EP2608789Therapeutic uses of 1-[2-(2,4-DIMETHYL-PHENYLSULFANYL)PHENYL]PIPERAZINEH.
